title: Campaign landing page assessed against a web accessibility pack with a supplied check list

jurisdiction_definitions.EU: Synthetic test jurisdiction; no legal interpretation is implied.

requirements.title: Pass the supplied landing-page accessibility checks and retain verification evidence
requirements.description: A campaign landing page must pass every check in `supplied_checks` and retain dated verification evidence recording each check result. The supplied check list is exhaustive for this requirement: no additional accessibility criteria may be read into it.

practice_records.consent_method: Unchecked affirmative opt-in checkbox on the lead form
practice_records.consent_evidence: SYNTHETIC-CMS-EXPORT-2026-07: form consent state retained per submission
practice_records.opt_out_process: One-click unsubscribe on any follow-up email; suppression list checked before send

check_results.keyboard_navigation: pass — all interactive elements reachable and operable by keyboard
check_results.colour_contrast: pass — all text meets the supplied contrast ratio
check_results.image_alt_text: fail — 6 of 9 campaign images have no alt text attribute
